forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Damaging winds possible about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning westerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible in the south. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, with possible small hail in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Damaging winds possible in the south. Winds west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon, possibly severe with destructive winds and large hail near the eastern border. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon, possibly severe with damaging winds in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning, possibly severe with damaging winds in the late morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning, possibly severe with damaging winds. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then becoming northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending south to southwesterly and becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Stuart Highway in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Marla, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon, possibly severe with destructive winds and large hail in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
